title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.700 - Recovery of penalty no bar to civil action
text:
532.700.  Recovery of penalty no bar to civil action. — The recoveries of any of the penalties under the provisions of this chapter shall be no bar to a civil action for damages.
(RSMo 1939 § 1655) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1491; 1919 § 1941; 1909 § 2506
